title: Partner With Us
description: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory has the tools, facilities and expertise to benefit industry leaders, academic institutions, agile startups and small nonprofits alike. Learn how our capabilities can help you gain a competitive edge
text:
Government
The Office of Government and External Affairs engages with federal, state and local governments, creating connections that apply our world-class expertise and resources to help these entities expand their impact. Together, we cultivate innovation and meet national and global security challenges.
Contact Us: government [at] llnl.gov (government[at]llnl[dot]gov)
Universities
The next generation of scientists will help solve the complex issues of tomorrow. Our Academic Engagement Office sustains recruitment activities and academic partnerships and enhances our community’s relationship with science. Every corner of the Laboratory engages students and faculty in collaborative research and work-study opportunities that harness curiosity.
Contact Us: aeo-info [at] llnl.gov (aeo-info[at]llnl[dot]gov)
Industries
The Innovation and Partnerships Office (IPO) makes promising connections between LLNL and collaborating businesses, non-profits and other organizations. Patent, royalty and licensing opportunities from technology pioneered at LLNL enable new businesses to drive economic growth locally, regionally and beyond.
Contact Us: ipo-support [at] llnl.gov (ipo-support[at]llnl[dot]gov)
Philanthropy
Collaborative opportunities with universities, nongovernmental organizations and nonprofits, including the Livermore Lab Foundation and the American Heart Association, leverage the Laboratory’s unique expertise for broad public benefit and philanthropic support of scientific research and STEM outreach.
Contact Us: philanthropy [at] llnl.gov (philanthropy[at]llnl[dot]gov)
